creator: luca.pizzamiglio@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 177505
The updating patch

devel/gdb: Update to version 7.12

Updating gdb to the last version.

* Removing all already upstreamed patches
* EXPAT i no longer an option, but it's mandatory (syscall support)
* Warnings removal

No quarterly merge is suggested, because it's a new version, not a minor update.

This update closes also some other PRs: 214918,211305,210798

Portlint: OK, with warnings (patches are still too complex to be generated with makepatch)
Poudriere: 93i386,11amd64, all options and non options
